reviews.comment:
Imposible comunicarse y encima el horario que figura en redes no es el mismo de atención. Me vine hasta acá y ya hacía media hora que habían cerrado. Una falta total de respeto x el tiempo ajeno

(Translated by Google)
It's impossible to get in touch, and to top it off, the hours listed on social media aren't the same as their actual opening hours. I came all the way here and they'd already been closed for half an hour. A total lack of respect for other people's time.

reviews.comment:
15:27 de un viernes. Todos los surtidores cerrados porque se pusieron a limpiar el piso de todas a la vez. Podrian dejar habilitadas al menos dos y no suspender el servicio. Esto no le ha e bien al ACA...

(Translated by Google)
3:27 PM on a Friday. All the pumps are closed because they started cleaning the floor of each one at once. They could at least leave two open and not suspend service. This doesn't reflect well on the ACA...

(Translated by Google)
They still have a long way to go to be a fully operational station. They lack attention and have very few staff.

reviews.comment:
Dice 24hs pero si pasas despues de las 22hs no te cargan con la excusa de que "no tienen sistema" o "estan actualizando el sistema" la verdad un desastre siendo socio de ACA presentare la misma queja. Modifiquen o horario y pongan en el que realmente atienden. No es la primera vez que me pasa.

(Translated by Google)
It says 24 hours, but if you go after 10 PM they won't let you in, using the excuse that "the system is down" or "they're updating the system." It's a disaster, really. As an ACA member, I'll be filing the same complaint. Please change the hours and post the ones you actually operate during. This isn't the first time this has happened to me.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pselRIazNUWFZLWVd4UE5EWnRXVll6UTBWdVYzYxAB
